name: James Horner
bio: James Horner's soundtrack catalog continues to earn because major film scores stay culturally tied to enduring franchises and rewatch behavior.
notable_for: Film-score composition with unusually strong catalog longevity.
career_highlight: Titanic remains one of the most commercially durable film-soundtrack ecosystems ever released.

earnings.assumptions: Estimate keeps James Horner's current headline range as the artist-side figure and models gross catalog, label, publishing, and writer lanes from that conservative annual range.

ownership.master_owner: Likely split across label, distributor, and artist-affiliated rights depending on recording era
ownership.publishing_owner: Writer and publisher splits materially affect final artist-side income
ownership.catalog_sale_status: No full catalog sale assumption baked into this modeled range
ownership.notes: James Horner's page should be read as modeled artist-side annual income, not a public royalty statement. Ownership and label terms can materially change take-home economics.
